reviews.review_description: It felt super repetitive and was hard to get over 30 kills before the timer runs out. There should be 3 modes, easy, medium, and hard
Such a boring game not worth the money.
I have just played this game and I have to say it's one of the best visual neon non stop shooter I have played on the oculus go , well worth the money.

developer_response.body: Thanks! We glad to hear, what you like this game.

reviews.review_description: This game is satisfying as far as shooters go.  I like that the timer was added and look forward to leaderboards.  Well worth the cost.

developer_response.body: Thanks you for your review and interest in the game.

reviews.review_description: Excuse me but this game was not that good. Very short, extremely simple and repetitive. Also the time counter it stressful. Without the timer counter maybe it could be worth buying this. The music is the same all the time and the visual effects were not that good. I am still keeping it to support the developer. I hope he or she can disable the timer. It could be worth playing it just for fun but still monotonous. Also the starfish for some reason is very difficult to shoot. Also object that are too far. Also if can be added more and varied music can improve a little the experience. With better quality.
When i open the game it dosent start
Simple shooter, but I like this style

developer_response.body: It's cool, what you like this too. Thanks for review.

reviews.review_description: Pleased with the game play itself, great music and sound effects, it's actually quite relaxing! I'd like to see a high score table, a timer in game so I can see how much time is left, and possibly different difficulty settings? Otherwise, definately worth the money.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for comments. We  added ingame timer in this update. In next updates we will add leaderboard.

reviews.review_description: I was very impressed with this game,good graphics and game play, keeps you on your toes

Would really like to see an “endless” mode that is not timed.  This has the potential to be a very relaxing game, but due to the timer it’s a bit stressful as the time keeps running out.

Would also like to see a setting to control how fast the gun shoots; seems slow at the moment.

The devs appear very active at reviewing and implementing the other comments here which is very nice to see.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We really appreciate your feedback, because it makes us understand how to improve the game. We heard your wish and will do an update soon.

reviews.review_description: Just a good game to chill and relax if your bored 10/10

The visuals are amazing and it's definitely a lot of fun to play. Unfortunately, it's very hard to get more than 30 or 40 kills before the timer runs out - I think the developers should definitely add another difficulty level for beginners with more time.
